title: Move GST Services section to last position with minimal content

requirements.summary: Reorder sections in App.tsx so GSTServicesSection appears last after all other brand and coming-soon sections
acceptanceCriteria: GSTServicesSection renders after all other brand and coming-soon sections in the page layout.
All other sections remain in their existing order above GST Services.

file_operations.description: Reorder the section components so that GSTServicesSection is rendered after AssuredToursSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, and ComingSoonSection. Keep all other sections (HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, Footer) in their current positions and only move GSTServicesSection to the last position among brand sections.

requirements.summary: Reduce GSTServicesSection content to minimal presentation with 3 service cards maximum and concise labels
acceptanceCriteria: GST Services section displays no more than 3 service cards.
Each card has only a short label — no lengthy descriptions or bullet points.
A brief introductory sentence about GST services is present under the section header.
The section still matches the gold/obsidian luxury theme of the rest of the site.

file_operations.description: Trim the GST services content to show only 3 service cards (down from 6) with short one-line labels and no detailed descriptions or bullet points. Replace the current descriptive text with a single brief introductory sentence about GST services. Keep the section header, banner image (frontend/public/assets/generated/gst-services-banner.dim_1200x400.png), and the gold/obsidian luxury styling intact. Maintain the scroll-triggered animations via useScrollAnimation hook.
